title: Trump ally wins Republican primary for Arizona governor, setting up race against Katie Hobbs
summary_full: The victory for Andy Biggs, who was a central figure in the effort to overturn Trump’s  2020 election defeat, sets up a high-stakes contest in the battleground stateArizona voters on Tuesday chose their nominees for governor, Congress and other top offices, setting up a fall campaign that will test whether Republicans can reverse some of the Trump-era losses they suffered in a premier battleground state.Andy Biggs, the hard-right congressman endorsed by Donald Trump, easily won the Republican nomination to challenge the incumbent Democrat, governor Katie Hobbs. Continue reading...
